CF

CasFin Protocol

Enter the dark green rail for games, markets, and live contract control.

Live Arbitrum Sepolia deployment connected

CasFin now has both rails live on testnet. This frontend is wired directly to the deployed vault, games, router, and market factory so users can move from protocol entry to action in one workspace.

Play Games

Deposit once, then run coin flip, dice, and crash from the same vault balance.

Use the casino rail for deposits, bankroll monitoring, game bets, and router operations.

Place Bet

Create a market, buy outcome shares, and close the full prediction loop from one surface.

Use the market rail for launch, share buying, manual resolution, finalization, and claiming.

Deployment SurfaceArbitrum Sepolia
Vault0x6F73...5ac1
Randomness Router0x9615...A72A
Coin Flip0x5774...6ecc
Dice0x66ec...38dc
Crash0xCc83...5EED
Market Factory0xC876...0B43

Protocol Workspace

Choose your rail and operate against the deployed contracts.

Status

Live Markets0

Prediction markets deployed by the factory and available for share buying.

Router Queue0

Manual randomness requests issued by live casino games.

Wallet RailRead only

Switch to Arbitrum Sepolia for write actions.

Start with the protocol gate, then choose your rail.

Vault

Deposit, withdraw, and monitor the shared casino balance.

Vault contract
Vault TVL0 ETH

Your locked balance0 ETH
Vault ownerNot set

Coin Flip

Fast 2x loop with manual randomness fulfillment.

Coin flip contract
House edge0.00%
Max bet0 ETH
Latest bet idNone

Dice

Pick a face from 1 to 6, then resolve after router fulfillment.

Dice contract

Crash

Start a round, place a target, then close and settle against the crash point.

Crash contract
Latest roundNone
Max cash out0.00x
Latest round stateNone

Flow

Casino rail in four steps.

01

Deposit ETH into the vault so every game can reserve stake from the same balance.

02

Place a bet on coin flip, dice, or crash using the shared vault-backed amount.

03

Fulfill randomness from the operator panel when a request is pending.

04

Resolve or settle the bet, then request and finalize a withdrawal if you want to exit.

Router

Manual randomness console.

Router contract
OwnerNot set
Next request id0
Latest requestNone
